response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A (The video contains gameplay and streamer commentary, with no vocal music). 2. JSON Usage: Discarded (The reference was only a placeholder log indicating no music). Manual transcription used for 100% of the streamer's commentary and the background voices. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed carefully to the streamer's spoken phrases. Aggressive truncation is applied where she transitions quickly or reacts to background noises/chat. Background speaker dialogue is transcribed and translated as well to provide full context.

subtitles.original: Okay, I'll at least put two combat bees in, just for traveling, just in case.
subtitles.english: Okay, I'll at least put two combat bees in, just for traveling, just in case.
Hoppers are fine.

subtitles.original: It's fine, it's fine. I think this is good.
subtitles.english: It's fine, it's fine. I think this is good.
Okay. Which way, though?
Which way?

subtitles.original: Okay, wait, wait, wait. Let me, let me remember the coordinates to my house.
subtitles.english: Okay, wait, wait, wait. Let me, let me remember the coordinates to my house.
All right.
Where's my notepad?
Okay.

subtitles.original: Shield? I have shield. Except I don't like using shields when I'm like flying, because it covers my view.
subtitles.english: Shield? I have shield. Except I don't like using shields when I'm like flying, because it covers my view.

subtitles.original: And you don't really need it.
subtitles.english: And you don't really need it.

subtitles.original: Okay, I wrote it down, so it should be fine.
subtitles.english: Okay, I wrote it down, so it should be fine.

subtitles.original: But which way should we fly?
subtitles.english: But which way should we fly?

subtitles.original: 18 degrees from North, that's very specific.
subtitles.english: 18 degrees from North, that's very specific.

subtitles.original: But there is one gate I saw.
subtitles.english: But there is one gate I saw.

subtitles.original: でもね、今やっとね、400万、8までいった...
subtitles.english: But you know, I finally got 4 million, up to 8...
4 million?
Well, let's go check it out.
It's far!

subtitles.original: Okay, let me mark that down.
subtitles.english: Okay, let me mark that down.

subtitles.original: I mean, there must be a reason this warp gate is here, right?
subtitles.english: I mean, there must be a reason this warp gate is here, right?
There must be a reason.
Right?

subtitles.original: Well, we can take a look. I wrote down the coordinates.
subtitles.english: Well, we can take a look. I wrote down the coordinates.

subtitles.original: Which direction are we going? South.
subtitles.english: Which direction are we going? South.
Woah!

subtitles.original: I'm sure that's probably looted already.
subtitles.english: I'm sure that's probably looted already.
We need what? Jungles?
Eh? That was fast!
I think they added...

subtitles.original: I didn't really need the Elytra. I mean, I guess it's... nice.
subtitles.english: I didn't really need the Elytra. I mean, I guess it's... nice.
I almost typed in "suika".
Ah, okay.
Eh, that was fast.
Oh, cocoa.

subtitles.original: Is there more, I wonder? There must be more around here.
subtitles.english: Is there more, I wonder? There must be more around here.

subtitles.original: I guess they might have added the portals so that we can... Oh, there's more right there.
subtitles.english: I guess they might have added the portals so that we can... Oh, there's more right there.
That was so quick.

subtitles.original: Well, leap of faith was nice, I guess.
subtitles.english: Well, leap of faith was nice, I guess.

subtitles.original: Though... Oh, that's a lot of seeds.
subtitles.english: Though... Oh, that's a lot of seeds.
Should I take more?
There might be more.

subtitles.original: I need the jungle... I don't think I really need cocoa. Cocoa is honestly a waste of time.
subtitles.english: I need the jungle... I don't think I really need cocoa. Cocoa is honestly a waste of time.

subtitles.original: Let's be real, now that we have suika.
subtitles.english: Let's be real, now that we have suika.

subtitles.original: There's really no need to make multiple recipes.
subtitles.english: There's really no need to make multiple recipes.
Right?
